name: Disabled Macroautophagy Outlook
main_evidence_gaps: The field still needs stronger evidence of long-lasting human functional improvement, not just evidence that autophagy targets changed.
strongest_current_evidence: Autophagy-linked programs can already point to human biomarker movement in several adjacent tracks.
interpretation_note: This hallmark benefits from overlap with nutrient sensing and mitochondrial maintenance, but clear public proof of long-lasting benefit is still limited.
